summary: Iteration 50: Complete testing of Commessa Hub Architecture - Event-driven state machine with module linking. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with lifecycle bar, action buttons, event confirmation, module linking dialog, and timeline all working correctly.

issues: Minor: React warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' for DialogContent - cosmetic accessibility warning, not affecting functionality

stati_endpoint.returns_lifecycle_states: PASS - GET /api/commesse/stati returns all 8 states (richiesta, bozza, rilievo_completato, firmato, in_produzione, fatturato, chiuso, sospesa)
stati_endpoint.returns_transitions: PASS - Returns EVENTO_TRANSITIONS dict with all event types

commessa_create.has_new_fields: PASS - POST creates commessa with stato, eventi[], moduli{}, numero fields
commessa_create.default_stato_bozza: PASS - Default stato is 'bozza' with COMMESSA_CREATA event
commessa_create.is_richiesta_flag: PASS - is_richiesta=true creates with stato='richiesta' and RICHIESTA_PREVENTIVO event

commessa_get.enhanced_response: PASS - GET returns enhanced commessa with moduli, stato, eventi, cantiere, riferimento

event_emission.advances_state: PASS - RILIEVO_COMPLETATO advances from bozza to rilievo_completato
event_emission.rejects_invalid: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid state transitions
event_emission.sospensione_saves_previous: PASS - SOSPENSIONE saves stato_precedente before moving to sospesa
event_emission.riattivazione_restores: PASS - RIATTIVAZIONE restores stato_precedente from sospesa

module_linking.link_module: PASS - POST link-module links single-value modules (preventivo, rilievo, etc.)
module_linking.link_array_module: PASS - POST link-module appends to array fields (fatture_ids, ddt_ids)
module_linking.unlink_module: PASS - POST unlink-module removes module reference

backward_compatibility.kanban_status_patch: PASS - PATCH /api/commesse/{id}/status works for Kanban drag-drop
backward_compatibility.board_view: PASS - GET /api/commesse/board/view returns Kanban columns with enhanced data

from_preventivo.creates_with_linked: PASS - Creates commessa with stato=richiesta and auto-linked preventivo

full_lifecycle.complete_flow: PASS - Full lifecycle from richiesta → rilievo_completato → firmato → in_produzione → fatturato → chiuso

planning_page.kanban_board: PASS - Kanban board loads with all columns (Nuove Commesse, Approvvigionamento, In Lavorazione, etc.)
planning_page.new_commessa_button: PASS - 'Nuova Commessa' button opens create modal
planning_page.create_modal: PASS - Create modal with title, client, value, deadline, priority, description fields
planning_page.card_click_navigation: PASS - Clicking card title navigates to /commesse/:commessaId

commessa_hub_page.info_card: PASS - Shows numero, title, client, stato badge, value, deadline
commessa_hub_page.lifecycle_bar: PASS - Shows all 7 main states with current state highlighted, past states with checkmarks
commessa_hub_page.action_buttons: PASS - Shows context-appropriate action buttons based on current stato
commessa_hub_page.linked_modules: PASS - Shows all 7 module types (Rilievo, Distinta, Preventivo, Fatture, DDT, Progetto FPC, Certificazione CE)
commessa_hub_page.events_timeline: PASS - Shows all events in reverse chronological order with tipo, note, operator, timestamp

action_dialogs.confirm_event_dialog: PASS - Opens with event name, description in Italian, optional note textarea, confirm/cancel buttons
action_dialogs.state_transition_ui: PASS - Updates stato badge, lifecycle bar, action buttons after event emission
action_dialogs.toast_notifications: PASS - Shows success toast with event name and new stato

link_module_dialog.dialog_opens: PASS - 'Collega Modulo' button opens link dialog
link_module_dialog.type_selector: PASS - Tipo Modulo dropdown with all module types
link_module_dialog.id_input: PASS - ID Modulo input with placeholder

critical_code_review_comments: State machine implementation is clean with EVENTO_TRANSITIONS dict providing clear transition rules
Backward compatibility with Kanban (status field) properly maintained while lifecycle (stato) operates independently
Event sourcing pattern implemented correctly - all state changes recorded as events with operator tracking
Module linking supports both single-value (preventivo_id) and array-value (fatture_ids) fields correctly
ensure_moduli() helper properly handles migration of old commesse without new fields
test_credentials: Session token: hub_session_1772277854222 for user hub-test-user-1772277854222
seed_data_creation: Created test commesse during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commessa Hub Architecture fully tested and working. Key new endpoints: GET /api/commesse/stati, POST /api/commesse/{id}/eventi, POST /api/commesse/{id}/link-module, POST /api/commesse/{id}/unlink-module, GET /api/commesse/{id}/hub. Frontend: CommessaHubPage.js at /commesse/:commessaId with lifecycle state machine bar, action buttons based on stato, linked modules section, events timeline. PlanningPage card click navigates to hub. Event sourcing working with EVENTO_TRANSITIONS validation. Backward compat with Kanban drag-drop maintained.
